data.title: Coinbase: Over 70% of institutional investors believe BTC is undervalued in the $85,000 to $95,000 range.
data.description: According to a Coinbase survey, over 70% of institutional investors believe Bitcoin is undervalued in its current price range of $85,000 to $95,000. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitget launches its "Million-Dollar Club" contract VIP program, with the first phase including limited-edition Moutai for the Year of the Horse.
data.description: Bitget has announced an upgrade to its contract VIP service system and launched the "Million Club" program. Eligible contract VIP users can receive a monthly premium physical gift box customized by the platform. The initial phase will be based on a snapshot of account data as of January 25, 2026, and will award a specific quantity of Feitian Moutai or a limited-edition Year of the Horse Moutai based on the user's contract trading volume over the past 30 days and their contract VIP level. The "Million Club" program will run from January to June 2026, and the gift boxes will include, but are not limited to, Moutai, physical gold, and Apple products. Specific benefits will be announced monthly. For more details, please visit the Bitget official platform.

data.title: South Korea to Launch Unit for Monitoring Crypto Tax Evasion
data.description: South Korea's National Tax Service (NTS) has announced plans to create a specialized unit aimed at addressing tax evasion in the virtual asset sector. According to NS3.AI, this new division will be responsible for managing all activities related to crypto tax evasion and will focus on developing systems to track and analyze transaction data. The initiative is part of the NTS's 2026 National Tax Administration Operation Plan, reflecting the country's commitment to enhancing oversight in the rapidly evolving digital asset landscape.

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses 2900 USDT Amid Daily Increase
data.description: Ethereum has risen above 2900 USDT, currently trading at 2900.24 USDT, marking a daily increase of 2.94%. According to Foresight News, this development was observed on Bitget's market data platform.

data.title: Global Crypto Sector Sees Over $222 Million in Funding Last Week
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that the global cryptocurrency sector witnessed 13 public funding events last week, with a total investment exceeding $222 million. The funding spanned various sectors including DeFi, Web3 combined with AI, infrastructure, and CeFi. Notable among these was Superstate Inc., which secured $82.5 million in a Series B round led by Bain Capital Crypto and Distributed Global. Additionally, Pomelo Latam raised $55 million in a Series C round, with Kaszek and Insight Partners as lead investors. Bitcoin payment startup ZBD Pay also announced the completion of a $40 million Series C funding round.

data.title: Sol Meme coin clawd surged over 110% intraday, pushing its market capitalization above $13 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the Solana chain's Meme coin, clawd, saw a daily increase of over 110%, briefly pushing its market capitalization above $13 million. It is currently trading at approximately $13.09 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: The total market capitalization of both tokenized gold and tokenized silver sectors reached new highs.
data.description: According to Coingecko data, as gold prices continue to rise, the total market capitalization of the tokenized gold sector has exceeded $5.27 billion, currently reaching $5,275,490,349, a 24-hour increase of 1%; the market capitalization of the tokenized silver sector has exceeded $400 million, currently reaching $439,598,206, a 24-hour increase of 4.5%, both reaching new highs.

data.title: Emergence of AI Operating Systems Highlights Decentralized Storage Potential
data.description:
Jack Kong, CEO of Nano Labs, posted on X about the emerging prototype of AI operating systems. A new system, built using Clawdbot, integrates multiple models with a command-line interface, skills, and a local management interface. It connects with platforms like WhatsApp, Telegram, iMessage, and Slack, offering features such as voice recognition, multi-layer memory, calendar management, email processing, scheduled tasks, and programming capabilities, making it accessible even to non-programmers.

Kong draws parallels between this architecture and the evolution of Web3 infrastructure. He suggests that as AI begins to integrate data streams across multiple platforms, the importance of decentralized storage and computing will become increasingly evident.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,900 USDT with a Narrowed 1.28% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 26, 2026, 07:19 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,900 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,901.870117 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.28% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: OCBC Bank: Raises its year-end 2026 gold price target to $5,600
data.description: OCBC Bank analysts have raised their gold price forecast, now expecting gold to reach $5,600 per ounce by the end of 2026. Christopher Wong, the bank's foreign exchange strategist, said the upward revision stemmed from the strong rally in the safe-haven metal, prompting an upward revision from the previous forecast of $4,800. Wong stated that the rise in gold prices reflects recent developments and their unexpected persistence, rather than a reassessment of the underlying logic. "What has evolved is the degree of gold allocation, not the fundamental reasons for holding gold," Wong pointed out. Rising government debt, geopolitical concerns, and policy uncertainty have significantly enhanced gold's structural position in investors' asset allocation. Gold is no longer merely a crisis or inflation hedge, but is increasingly seen as a neutral and reliable store of value, providing asset diversification. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tokenized Gold and Silver Market Caps Reach New Highs
data.description: Tokenized gold and silver markets have reached new highs as precious metal prices rise. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coingecko indicates that the total market capitalization of tokenized gold has surpassed $5.25 billion, currently standing at $5,257,493,257, with a 24-hour increase of 0.8%. Meanwhile, the market capitalization of tokenized silver has exceeded $400 million, now at $434,167,100, reflecting a 24-hour growth of 3.3%.

data.title: South Korea's Virtual Asset Law Faces Delays Amid Controversy
data.description:
South Korea's progress on the second phase of its Virtual Asset Law has been delayed due to disputes over key provisions. According to PANews, the legislation aims to comprehensively regulate digital assets, including stablecoins. The main points of contention involve the eligibility of issuers for Korean won stablecoins, debating whether banks or authorized enterprises should lead, and whether to relax the separation of financial and virtual asset businesses to foster innovation. Additionally, the proposal to cap major shareholders' stakes in exchanges at 15%-20% has been criticized as overly restrictive.

The legislative delay has also stalled discussions on related topics, such as spot virtual asset ETFs and the involvement of listed companies in virtual asset trading. Negotiations continue among government agencies, industry participants, and political groups.
